Tampa Bay Counties

Tampa Bay spans 8 counties, each with its own character, cost of living, and lifestyle. Pick a county to explore cities, neighborhoods, and what it's really like to live there.

Moving to Citrus County, Florida

Everything you need to know about relocating to Citrus County, Florida. Crystal River, Homosassa, manatees, nature, affordable living, and honest local insight.

Moving to Hernando County, Florida

Everything you need to know about relocating to Hernando County, Florida. Spring Hill, Brooksville, affordable living, nature, and honest local insight.

Moving to Hillsborough County, Florida

Everything you need to know about relocating to Hillsborough County, Florida. Cities, cost of living, schools, neighborhoods, and honest local insight.

Moving to Manatee County, Florida

Everything you need to know about relocating to Manatee County, Florida. Bradenton, Lakewood Ranch, Anna Maria Island, and honest local insight.

Moving to Pasco County, Florida

Everything you need to know about relocating to Pasco County, Florida. Wesley Chapel, New Port Richey, land costs, schools, and honest local insight.

Moving to Pinellas County, Florida

Everything you need to know about relocating to Pinellas County, Florida. Cities, cost of living, schools, beaches, and honest local insight.

Moving to Polk County, Florida

Everything you need to know about relocating to Polk County, Florida. Lakeland, Winter Haven, affordable housing, LEGOLAND, and honest local insight.

Moving to Sarasota County, Florida

Everything you need to know about relocating to Sarasota County, Florida. Siesta Key, Venice, arts and culture, beaches, and honest local insight.

TBRelo

Your complete guide to relocating to Tampa Bay, Florida. Covering Hillsborough, Pinellas, Pasco, Hernando, Polk, Manatee, Sarasota, and Citrus counties with honest, local insight from someone who actually lives here.
